endpoints.notes: Replace {{GAMBITCOMM_USERNAME}} with your GAMBITCOMM USERNAME. Replace {{GAMBITCOMM_PASSWORD}} with your GAMBITCOMM PASSWORD. Replace {{INTERVAL}} with a real interval. Replace {{ARG}} with a real arg. Replace {{SCRIPT}} with a real script.

endpoints.name: Remove a timer script from the execution list.
endpoints.description: The first scheduled script that matches the script name, and optionally the interval and argument will be deleted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GAMBITCOMM_USERNAME}} with your GAMBITCOMM USERNAME. Replace {{GAMBITCOMM_PASSWORD}} with your GAMBITCOMM PASSWORD. Replace {{INTERVAL}} with a real interval. Replace {{ARG}} with a real arg. Replace {{SCRIPT}} with a real script.

endpoints.name: List the timer scripts currently running along with the their intervals.
endpoints.description: The command mimic timer script list lists global timer scripts, the command /mimic/timer/script/{agentNum}/list is the per-agent equivalent NOTE Global timer scripts run globally but within them you can address individual agents using {agentNum}. To schedule timerscripts for an individual agent, use /mimic/timer/script/{agentNum}.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GAMBITCOMM_USERNAME}} with your GAMBITCOMM USERNAME. Replace {{GAMBITCOMM_PASSWORD}} with your GAMBITCOMM PASSWORD.
